reason: This is a simple Quranic verse quote (from Surah An-Nisa, verse 5) about proper handling of wealth and speaking kindly. It contains no extremist content or ISIS-related messaging.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: (ولا تؤتوا السفهاء أموالكم التي جعل الله لكم قياما وارزقوهم فيها واكسوهم وقولوا لهم قولا معروفا) [النساء5]7as
